race.comment: NAVY BUOY (5) raced handy but offered little in the run home when resuming over 1300m at Warwick Farm last start. Has a far better record at the mile and handles the going. Ben Looker, with two wins from two rides on the four-year-old, is back aboard. Can turn things around. TALANA (6) stalked the pace then kept trying when a close third last time out over 1520m at Inverell. Scored a big win two back on a heavy track over this course and distance. Up in grade but with just 53kgs after the claim is right in contention. REBEL RHAPSODY (3) led and just failed to hang on recently in a 1400m BM64 at Hawkesbury. Yet to prove himself at 1600m but should give plenty of cheek. FULL REGALIA (4) led and gave a kick but found the winner a shade too good (TALANA third) at Inverell last start. Yet to fire on a heavy track which is the knock. The same cannot be said for SUPREME COMMAND (2) who has won three from six in heavy conditions. Raced once at the mile for a win so he has the right profile.
